title: selaginella fruticulosa
intro: Selaginella fruticulosa, also known as the "Spiked Spike Moss," is a type of plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella fruticulosa include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for its medicinal properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
